ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Timepoint/visit label
Notes: e.g., Baseline, 6-Month Follow Up, Year 2; Morning, At Bedtime

ElementDescription: In the past 6 months, I have... Received racist insults regarding my online profile (e.g., profile pictures, user ID).
In the past 6 months, I have... Been kicked out of an online social group because I talked about race/ethnicity.
In the past 6 months, I have... Been intentionally invited to join racist online social groups/hate groups.
In the past 6 months, I have... Received replies/posts suggesting that I should avoid connecting online with friends from my own racial/ethnic group.
In the past 6 months, I have... Received racist insults about how I write online.
In the past 6 months, I have... Been threatened of being harmed or killed due to my race/ethnicity.

In the past 6 months, I have... Been unfriended/lost online ties because I disagreed with racist posts.
In the past 6 months, I have... Been informed about a viral/trending racist event happening elsewhere (e.g., in a different location).
In the past 6 months, I have... Been informed about unfairness in healthcare for racial/ethnic minorities (e.g., biased quality of treatment, insurance issues).
In the past 6 months, I have... Seen online videos (e.g., YouTube) that portray my racial/ethnic group negatively.
In the past 6 months, I have... Encountered online resources (e.g., Urban Dictionary) promoting negative racial/ethnic stereotypes as if they are true.
In the past 6 months, I have... Been informed about unfairness in financial gains for racial/ethnic minorities (e.g., higher suspension rates for racial/ethnic minority students).

In the past 6 months, I have... Been informed about a viral/trending racist event that I was not aware of.
In the past 6 months, I have... Seen online news articles that describe my racial/ethnic group negatively.
In the past 6 months, I have... Seen photos (e.g., Google images) that portray my racial/ethnic group negatively.
In the past 6 months, I have... Encountered a viral/trending online racist content (e.g., many likes, stars).
In the past 6 months, I have... Encountered online hate groups/communities against non-White racial/ethnic groups.
In the past 6 months, I have... Seen other racial/minority users receive racist comments.
In the past 6 months, I have... Seen other racial/minority users being treated like a second-class citizen.
In the past 6 months, I have... Seen other racial/minority users being treated like a criminal.
In the past 6 months, I have... Seen other racial/minority users receive racist insults regarding their online profile (e.g., profile pictures, user ID).
